turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: My heart's racing and I can't stop shaking. I feel like something terrible is about to happen.

turns.speaker: Counselor
turns.text: That sounds frightening. You're safe right now, and we'll take this one small step at a time.

turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: Okay... okay, that's helping a little. My breathing is slowing down.

turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: Thank you for staying calm with me. I think I can get through tonight after all.
